narrative:
Fairborn 208 (precinct in Greene County) has 693 registered voters, with 63.9% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 20.3% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 15.7%, a modest Republican lean of 4.6 percentage points.
